result:
Implemented browser-based note creation and editing in the `serve` UI.

The main changes are in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L615): I added `GET /new`, `POST /notes`, `GET /notes/{id}/edit`, and `POST /notes/{id}` handlers, plus form-state helpers so the web UI now writes the same Markdown note format as the CLI. The page template now includes a “New note” action, a note edit action, and full create/edit forms with title, tags, body, and archived state in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go#L2197).

I also added HTTP tests covering the new browser flows in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go#L1624) and updated the `serve` description in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md#L51).

I could not run `gofmt` or `go test` here because this environment does not actually have `go`/`gofmt` installed on `PATH`, despite the path entries being present.
